title: AutoTorch
description: Do you have torch fatigue? Then AutoTorch is the solution.
body:
**Have you or your players had enough of placing torches when you are mining, exploring a cave or just wondering at night? Then this plugin is for you!**
## Main features:
- WorldGuard region support (don't place torches in build deny)
- Support Spigot/Paper 1.16.5+
- Torches can be taken from inventory, off hand or primary hand
- Torches can be placed at certain light levels with a radius
- Blacklist of blocks that torches can be placed on
- Boundaries for the y axis
- Place torches on walls
- Translate file for player-facing UI

## Permissions:
- autotorch.auto - Permits the player to turn on auto torch placing on and off
- autotorch.admin - Allows the player to view plugin information, reset the config, reset the list of players who have autotorch enabled and check for updates
- autotorch.* - All permissions listed above

## Commands:
- /at - Open the AutoTorch GUI where players can enabled/disable torch placing. They can also modify their settings.
- /ata - Plugin details

## Installation:
All you need to do is to download and copy the file into your plugins folder. If you need to configure anything you will first need to start up the server, then you can go into the AutoTorch folder where you can find global.yml (for settings that apply to all users) and player.yml where you can specify the player's default settings.
